title: Craft Family Design System
html_prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS design showcase for the Craft Family design system. Dark theme (#0f0f0f background) with ambient radial gradient lights (white top-left, yellow top-right for Life series, blue bottom). Features: (1) Series toggle pill buttons (Efficiency white / Life yellow) with animated transitions; (2) Large glassmorphism product card (240–300px) with gentle float animation, radial spotlight behind, shine sweep on hover, and oversized mono first-letter logo; (3) Fade-transitioned product name and description below card; (4) Glass modal with blur backdrop for product details, bottom-sheet on mobile / centered on desktop; (5) Dock navigation bar with 5 circular icon buttons, active state glow (white for Efficiency, yellow for Life), and hover tooltips. All interactions are pure CSS/JS with no external dependencies. Typography: Inter (sans) and SFMono (mono).

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
